3192160.name: Global Shipping Simulator
3192160.description:
Dive into the fast-paced world of global logistics with Global Shipping Simulator! Manage your own delivery business and ensure that every order is prepared with precision. Scan items, print labels, pack boxes, and make sure everything is ready for worldwide shipping. You'll also need to oversee the loading platform and call a courier to pick up the packages on time.

But that's not all! You’ll also have the opportunity to build and customize your own home as well as your delivery factory. With a complete shop system, you can purchase furniture, textures, tiles, wallpaper, and even paint to personalize your space.

Manage your vital needs too: health, food, thirst, sleep, and more. To expand your business or upgrade your home, visit the bank to take out loans.

Global Shipping Simulator is much more than just a management game. It’s an immersive experience where every decision matters. Get ready to become the master of global logistics!
3192160.supported_languages: 英语, 法语, 意大利语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 土耳其语, 简体中文, 韩语, 日语, 荷兰语, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西, 葡萄牙语 - 葡萄牙, 俄语
